0.fr: Je vais partager avec vous en français ma passion, l'aéronautique.

en_intermediate.it: I will share with you in French my passion, aeronautics.
en_intermediate.ru: I will share with you in French my passion, aeronautics.

final.it: Condividerò con voi in francese la mia passione, l'aeronautica.
final.ru: Я поделюсь с вами по-французски своей страстью, аэронавтикой.

1.fr: Tout ceci commence par une anecdote trop blande qui m'est arrivé il y a quelques années.

en_intermediate.it: All of this starts with an overly bland anecdote that happened to me a few years ago.
en_intermediate.ru: All of this starts with an overly bland anecdote that happened to me a few years ago.

final.it: Tutto questo inizia con un aneddoto troppo blando che mi è successo qualche anno fa.
final.ru: Всё это начинается с слишком слезливого анекдота, который произошел со мной несколько лет назад.

2.fr: Lorsque un ami me contacta, étant passionné des viations et ébident en Toulouse,

en_intermediate.it: When a friend contacted me, being passionate about viations and ebident in Toulouse,
en_intermediate.ru: When a friend contacted me, being passionate about viations and ebident in Toulouse,

final.it: Quando un amico mi ha contattato, appassionato di viazioni ed ebident a Tolosa,
final.ru: Когда мой друг связался со мной, увлекаясь прозвищами и еврейкой в Тулузе,

3.fr: il avait trouvé des pièces d'avions dans la terre au sud de Toulouse et il menait de l'identifier.

en_intermediate.it: He had found pieces of aircraft in the land south of Toulouse and led to his identification.
en_intermediate.ru: He had found pieces of aircraft in the land south of Toulouse and led to his identification.

final.it: Aveva trovato pezzi di aereo nella terra a sud di Tolosa e portato alla sua identificazione.
final.ru: Он обнаружил части самолёта на земле к югу от Тулузы и провел опознание.

4.fr: J'ai mis des photos de ces pièces sur un site internet spécialisé, rapidement les réponses arrivaire.

en_intermediate.it: I put photos of these pieces on a specialized website, quickly the answers arrived.
en_intermediate.ru: I put photos of these pieces on a specialized website, quickly the answers arrived.

final.it: Ho messo le foto di questi pezzi su un sito web specializzato, rapidamente le risposte sono arrivate.
final.ru: Я поместил фотографии этих статей на специализированный сайт, быстро пришли ответы.

5.fr: Ce sont des pièces d'un avion anglais et d'autres réponses suivirent.

en_intermediate.it: These are parts of an English plane and other answers followed.
en_intermediate.ru: These are parts of an English plane and other answers followed.

final.it: Queste sono parti di un aereo inglese e altre risposte sono seguite.
final.ru: Это части английского самолета и другие ответы.

6.fr: C'est un avril en castère, un bombardier anglais quadrimoteur, qui en 1944, fut battu au sud de Toulouse.

en_intermediate.it: It was an April in caster, an English four-engine bomber, who in 1944 was beaten south of Toulouse.
en_intermediate.ru: It was an April in caster, an English four-engine bomber, who in 1944 was beaten south of Toulouse.

final.it: Era un aprile a Caster, un bombardiere inglese a quattro motori, che nel 1944 fu battuto a sud di Tolosa.
final.ru: Это был апрель в кастере, английский четырехмоторный бомбардировщик, который в 1944 году был избит к югу от Тулузы.

7.fr: La personne avec qui j'étais en relation me mis en contact avec une retraitée, Arlette,

en_intermediate.it: The person I was in contact with puts me in contact with a retired woman, Arlette,
en_intermediate.ru: The person I was in contact with puts me in contact with a retired woman, Arlette,

final.it: La persona con cui ero in contatto mi mette in contatto con una donna in pensione, Arlette,
final.ru: Человек, с которым я общался, связывает меня с пенсионеркой, Арлетт,

8.fr: qui connaissait très bien l'histoire de cet avion.

en_intermediate.it: who knew the story of this plane very well.
en_intermediate.ru: who knew the story of this plane very well.

final.it: che conosceva molto bene la storia di questo aereo.
final.ru: который хорошо знал историю этого самолета.

9.fr: Arlette me racontait qu'elle s'était occupée d'accueillir les familles des membres d'équipages de cet avion anglais,

en_intermediate.it: Arlette told me that she had taken care of welcoming the families of the crew members of this English plane,
en_intermediate.ru: Arlette told me that she had taken care of welcoming the families of the crew members of this English plane,

final.it: Arlette mi ha detto che si era presa cura di accogliere le famiglie dei membri dell'equipaggio di questo aereo inglese,
final.ru: Арлетт сказала мне, что она позаботилась о том, чтобы приветствовать семьи членов экипажа этого английского самолета,

en_intermediate.ru: and I feel that it will be decisive for the future.

en_intermediate.ru: Even more extreme, retrograde or archaic.

final.it: Ancora più estremo, retrogrado o arcaico.
final.ru: Еще более экстремально, ретроградный или архаичный.

5.fr: Peut-être qu'à l'inverse, vous êtes moderne.

en_intermediate.it: Maybe, on the other hand, you're modern.
en_intermediate.ru: Maybe, on the other hand, you're modern.

final.it: Forse, d'altra parte, sei moderno.
final.ru: Может быть, с другой стороны, ты современная.

en_intermediate.it: You're looking for efficiency.
en_intermediate.ru: You're looking for efficiency.

final.it: Stai cercando efficienza.
final.ru: Ты ищешь эффективности.

7.fr: Vous êtes progressiste, performant, aïtèque et volutionniste.

en_intermediate.it: You're progressive, you're performing, you're watering and you're revolutionist.
en_intermediate.ru: You're progressive, you're performing, you're watering and you're revolutionist.

final.it: Sei progressista, stai recitando, stai innaffiando e sei rivoluzionario.
final.ru: Ты прогрессивный, ты играешь, ты поливаешь и ты революционер.

8.fr: Ces cases rassurent tout le monde.

en_intermediate.it: These boxes reassure everyone.
en_intermediate.ru: These boxes reassure everyone.

final.it: Queste scatole rassicurano tutti.
final.ru: Эти коробки убеждают всех.

9.fr: Ça nous donne des repères, des valeurs, des chemins

en_intermediate.it: It gives us benchmarks, values, paths.
en_intermediate.ru: It gives us benchmarks, values, paths.

final.it: Ci dà parametri, valori, percorsi.
final.ru: Это дает нам ориентиры, ценности, пути.

en_intermediate.it: My name is Julien Lebroton
en_intermediate.ru: My name is Julien Lebroton

final.it: Mi chiamo Julien Lebroton.
final.ru: Меня зовут Жюльен Лебротон.

2.fr: et comme mon nom ne l'indique pas, je suis né et j'habite en Neville-Caldenny.

en_intermediate.it: And as my name does not indicate, I was born and I live in Neville-Caldenny.
en_intermediate.ru: And as my name does not indicate, I was born and I live in Neville-Caldenny.

final.it: E come il mio nome non indica, sono nato e vivo a Neville-Caldenny.
final.ru: И мое имя не указывает на то, что я родилась и живу в Невилле-Калденни.

3.fr: Là, je vous présente l'éptomire Max

en_intermediate.it: This is Max's epitomy.
en_intermediate.ru: This is Max's epitomy.

final.it: Questa e' l'epitomia di Max.
final.ru: Это эпитомия Макса.

en_intermediate.it: And here, Retidoponera.
en_intermediate.ru: And here, Retidoponera.

final.it: E qui, Retidoponera.
final.ru: А вот и Ретидопонера.

5.fr: Ce sont deux espèces de fourmis endémiques de Neville-Caldenny.

en_intermediate.it: They are two endemic species of ants of Neville-Caldenny.
en_intermediate.ru: They are two endemic species of ants of Neville-Caldenny.

final.it: Sono due specie endemiche di formiche di Neville-Caldenny.
final.ru: Это два эндемических вида муравьёв Невилл-Калденни.

6.fr: J'ai eu la chance de pouvoir étudier les fourmis pendant nombreuses années

en_intermediate.it: I've had the chance to study ants for many years.
en_intermediate.ru: I've had the chance to study ants for many years.

final.it: Ho avuto la possibilità di studiare formiche per molti anni.
final.ru: У меня был шанс изучать муравьев много лет.

7.fr: et quelque chose qui m'a fasciné chez les fourmis, comme beaucoup d'entre vous,

en_intermediate.it: and something that fascinated me in the ants, like many of you,
en_intermediate.ru: and something that fascinated me in the ants, like many of you,

final.it: e qualcosa che mi ha affascinato nelle formiche, come molti di voi,
final.ru: и что-то, что очаровало меня в муравьях, как и многих из вас,

en_intermediate.it: I guess it's self-organization.
en_intermediate.ru: I guess it's self-organization.

final.it: Immagino sia auto-organizzazione.
final.ru: Думаю, это самоорганизация.

9.fr: chez les fourmis, il n'y a pas de chef.

en_intermediate.it: In ants, there's no chief.
en_intermediate.ru: In ants, there's no chief.

final.it: Nelle formiche, non c'e' nessun capo.
final.ru: В муравьях нет шефа.

en_intermediate.it: Good evening.
en_intermediate.ru: Good evening.

final.it: Buonasera.
final.ru: Добрый вечер.

2.fr: Notre planète est recouverte à 70% d'océan.

en_intermediate.it: Our planet is 70% ocean covered.
en_intermediate.ru: Our planet is 70% ocean covered.

final.it: Il nostro pianeta è coperto al 70% dall'oceano.
final.ru: Наша планета на 70% покрыта океаном.

3.fr: Et pourtant étrangement, on a choisi de la plaie la Terre.

en_intermediate.it: And yet strangely, we have chosen Earth from the plague.
en_intermediate.ru: And yet strangely, we have chosen Earth from the plague.

final.it: Eppure, stranamente, abbiamo scelto la Terra dalla peste.
final.ru: И все же странно, что мы выбрали Землю из чумы.

4.fr: Le poète Étocotfoliam, c'est une vision bien plus objective et moins entrepose en trick.

en_intermediate.it: The poet Etocotfoliam, it is a much more objective vision and less stored in trick.
en_intermediate.ru: The poet Etocotfoliam, it is a much more objective vision and less stored in trick.

final.it: Il poeta Etocotfoliam, è una visione molto più oggettiva e meno memorizzata nel trucco.
final.ru: Поэт Этокотфолиам, это гораздо более объективное видение и меньшее, что хранится в трюке.

5.fr: Quand il dit que vu de l'espace, la planète est bleue, vu de l'espace,

en_intermediate.it: When he says that from space, the planet is blue, seen from space,
en_intermediate.ru: When he says that from space, the planet is blue, seen from space,

final.it: Quando dice che dallo spazio, il pianeta è blu, visto dallo spazio,
final.ru: Когда он говорит, что из космоса, планета синяя, видимая из космоса,

6.fr: elle est le territoire non pas des hommes, mais des ballaines.

en_intermediate.it: It is the territory not of men, but of ballaines.
en_intermediate.ru: It is the territory not of men, but of ballaines.

final.it: È il territorio non degli uomini, ma delle ballaine.
final.ru: Это территория не людей, а балаинов.

7.fr: Et pourtant, on vient tous de l'océan.

en_intermediate.it: And yet, we all come from the ocean.
en_intermediate.ru: And yet, we all come from the ocean.

final.it: Eppure, veniamo tutti dall'oceano.
final.ru: И все же, мы все приходим из океана.

8.fr: C'est le berceau de la vie, même si on l'a oublié.

en_intermediate.it: It's the cradle of life, even if we forgot it.
en_intermediate.ru: It's the cradle of life, even if we forgot it.

final.it: E' la culla della vita, anche se l'abbiamo dimenticata.
final.ru: Это колыбель жизни, даже если мы забыли об этом.

9.fr: L'océan est partout dans les glaciers, dans les rivières, dans les napfriatiques,

en_intermediate.it: The ocean is everywhere in glaciers, in rivers, in napfriatics,
en_intermediate.ru: The ocean is everywhere in glaciers, in rivers, in napfriatics,

final.it: L'oceano è ovunque nei ghiacciai, nei fiumi, nelle napfriatiche,
final.ru: Океан везде в ледниках, в реках, в спайфриатике,
